eq: of (referring to a person or people)
eq_dg: Neno rinahumirwa kuonyesa atu ni a yupi ama ni a phatu gani.

eq: he or she is, they are, he or she was
eq_dg: Neno rinaonyesa kukala mutu a hipho ama kala a hipho.

eq: them, they (used alone, often for emphasis)

eq: (ano ani) who? nani? Ni ani aphiyaye? Who is going? Ni ano ani aphiyao? Who are going?

eq_dg: Kuswali na kulavya sadaka, hasa ng'ombe, mbuzi, ama kuku, kpwa sababu ya kuomba baraka.
